component.name: Canonic
component.summary: Local-first git-powered markdown editor for product teams

description.p: Canonic is a local-first desktop document editor for product managers. It pairs a clean markdown writing experience with git versioning, AI assistance, inline comments, per-document branching, LAN sharing, and peer discovery — all on your own machine, with no server required.

ul.li: Git-backed version history for every document
AI writing assistance via OpenAI-compatible providers
Share documents over your LAN with fine-grained permissions
Automatic peer discovery on the local network (mDNS)

description.p: Flatpak packaging for Linux (Alpine, Arch, and any distro with Flatpak).
